requirement_topic.en: Importer RUT Registration (SII) and Spanish Labelling
requirement_topic.zh: 进口商RUT注册（SII）及西班牙语标签
requirement_topic.zht: 進口商RUT註冊（SII）及西班牙語標籤

summary.en: Commercial imports into Chile require a Chilean importer entity holding a valid RUT (Rol Único Tributario) number issued by the SII (Servicio de Impuestos Internos — Chilean tax authority). The RUT is the taxpayer identification number required for customs clearance via the Servicio Nacional de Aduanas (Chilean Customs). Product labelling must be in Spanish, including product name, importer name and address, country of origin, model, and applicable SUBTEL TS homologation number. No direct CCC or SRRC equivalent obligation exists on the Chinese exporter side.
summary.zh: 向智利商业进口须有持有效SII（智利税务局——Servicio de Impuestos Internos）颁发的RUT（Rol Único Tributario）编号的智利进口商实体。RUT是通过Servicio Nacional de Aduanas（智利海关）清关所需的纳税人识别号。产品标签须使用西班牙语，包括产品名称、进口商名称和地址、原产国、型号及适用的SUBTEL TS均质化编号。中国出口商方面无CCC或SRRC的直接对等义务。
summary.zht: 向智利商業進口須有持有效SII（智利稅務局——Servicio de Impuestos Internos）頒發的RUT（Rol Único Tributario）編號的智利進口商實體。RUT是通過Servicio Nacional de Aduanas（智利海關）通關所需的納稅人識別號。產品標籤須使用西班牙語，包括產品名稱、進口商名稱和地址、原產國、型號及適用的SUBTEL TS均質化編號。中國出口商方面無CCC或SRRC的直接對等義務。

standards_or_laws: SII RUT (Rol Único Tributario) — Servicio de Impuestos Internos (Chile)
Servicio Nacional de Aduanas — Chilean customs clearance requirements
SUBTEL labelling requirements (TS number + Spanish labelling on radio/telecom equipment)

summary.en: Chinese exporters do not have a direct equivalent obligation. In China, the exporter (manufacturer or trading company) holds a customs registration code (USCC — Unified Social Credit Code) for export declarations. SRRC and CCC certificates are held by the applicant company in China. The Chilean RUT and Spanish labelling obligations fall on the Chilean importer, but the Chinese exporter must coordinate to ensure labels are applied before shipment.
summary.zh: 中国出口商无直接对等义务。在中国，出口商（制造商或贸易公司）持有用于出口申报的海关注册代码（USCC——统一社会信用代码）。SRRC和CCC证书由中国申请公司持有。智利RUT和西班牙语标签义务由智利进口商承担，但中国出口商须协调确保出货前标签已贴附。
summary.zht: 中國出口商無直接對等義務。在中國，出口商（製造商或貿易公司）持有用於出口申報的海關註冊代碼（USCC——統一社會信用代碼）。SRRC和CCC證書由中國申請公司持有。智利RUT和西班牙語標籤義務由智利進口商承擔，但中國出口商須協調確保出貨前標籤已貼附。

standards_or_laws: China Customs registration (USCC — Unified Social Credit Code) for export declarations
No equivalent Spanish labelling or Chilean RUT obligation imposed on the Chinese exporter

gap.en: A Chilean importer with a valid SII RUT is required for customs clearance; Chinese exporters cannot import directly without a local Chilean entity. All product labelling must be in Spanish, including the SUBTEL TS homologation number. The Chinese exporter must coordinate with the Chilean importer to ensure SUBTEL-compliant Spanish labels are affixed before or upon arrival in Chile.
gap.zh: 海关通关须有持有效SII RUT的智利进口商；中国出口商不能在没有智利本地实体的情况下直接进口。所有产品标签须使用西班牙语，包括SUBTEL TS均质化编号。中国出口商须与智利进口商协调，确保符合SUBTEL要求的西班牙语标签在到达智利前或到达时已贴附。
gap.zht: 海關通關須有持有效SII RUT的智利進口商；中國出口商不能在沒有智利本地實體的情況下直接進口。所有產品標籤須使用西班牙語，包括SUBTEL TS均質化編號。中國出口商須與智利進口商協調，確保符合SUBTEL要求的西班牙語標籤在到達智利前或到達時已貼附。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Chilean importer holding a valid SII RUT is mandatory for customs clearance of commercial imports into Chile. Spanish labelling including the SUBTEL TS homologation number is required on all radio and telecom terminal equipment. Chinese exporters must coordinate with their Chilean importer to ensure compliant labels are prepared before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 向智利商业进口通关须有持有效SII RUT的智利进口商。所有无线电及电信终端设备须强制使用包含SUBTEL TS均质化编号的西班牙语标签。中国出口商须与智利进口商协调，确保出货前已准备合规标签。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 向智利商業進口通關須有持有效SII RUT的智利進口商。所有無線電及電信終端裝置須強制使用包含SUBTEL TS均質化編號的西班牙語標籤。中國出口商須與智利進口商協調，確保出貨前已準備合規標籤。
